title: Kevin Warsh gave his preferred way for measuring inflation. It could come back to bite him
summary: Kevin Warsh, a former Federal Reserve governor, proposed an alternative inflation measurement method, but Bank of America economist Aditya Bhave warned that the recalculation may not achieve Warsh's intended goals. The approach could face economic headwinds that undermine its effectiveness.
content: But Bank of America economist Aditya Bhave warned Wednesday that such a recalculation might not pan out as the former Fed governor hopes.

zh.title: 凯文·沃什提出了他首选的通胀测量方式。这可能会反咬他一口
zh.summary: 前美联储主席凯文·沃什提出了一种替代通胀测量方法，但美国银行经济学家阿迪亚·巴夫警告称，重新计算可能无法实现沃什的预期目标。这种方法可能面临经济逆风，破坏其有效性。

title: Bessent says 'many' U.S. allies have asked for currency swaps amid Iran war turbulence
summary: Treasury Secretary Bessent claims multiple U.S. allies have requested currency swap lines amid tensions over Iran, though the White House contradicted this by stating the UAE had not requested such measures. The conflicting statements reflect uncertainty about international financial coordination during regional instability.
content: The White House on Tuesday said the UAE had not requested a currency swap line.

zh.title: Bessent称"许多"美国盟国在伊朗战争动荡中要求货币互换
zh.summary: 美国财政部长Bessent声称多个美国盟国在伊朗紧张局势中要求货币互换额度，但白宫否认了这一说法，表示阿联酋没有提出过此类要求。相互矛盾的声明反映了区域不稳定期间国际金融协调的不确定性。

title: Iran attacks oil tankers in Hormuz, sending oil back above $101 a barrel
summary: Iran's attacks on oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz have disrupted crude supplies and pushed prices above $101 per barrel, with broader economic effects including higher gasoline prices. The supply disruptions underscore geopolitical risks to global energy security.
content: Oil-supply disruptions are starting to take hold, beyond $4-a-gallon gas.

zh.title: 伊朗在荷尔木兹海峡攻击油轮，油价回升至每桶101美元以上
zh.summary: 伊朗在荷尔木兹海峡对油轮的攻击中断了原油供应，将价格推至每桶101美元以上，更广泛的经济影响包括汽油价格上升。供应中断凸显了全球能源安全面临的地缘政治风险。

title: Billionaire backer sues Trump family's crypto firm over alleged extortion
summary: Investor Justin Sun is suing Trump family's World Liberty crypto venture after investing $45 million in the company's tokens, alleging extortion. The lawsuit highlights internal disputes within the high-profile crypto project.
content: Billionaire investor Justin Sun is suing the family's World Liberty crypto venture after spending $45m on its tokens.

zh.title: 亿万富翁起诉特朗普家族加密货币公司涉嫌敲诈
zh.summary: 投资者贾斯汀·孙在向特朗普家族世界自由加密货币项目投入4500万美元后，以敲诈罪起诉该公司。这场诉讼突显了这个高知名度加密项目内部的纠纷。

title: Trump administration in advanced talks for Spirit Airlines rescue package, sources say
summary: The Trump administration is negotiating a rescue package for struggling budget carrier Spirit Airlines, signaling potential government intervention in the aviation sector. The move reflects concerns about preserving airline capacity and competition.
content: The Trump administration is preparing to rescue ailing budget carrier Spirit Airlines.

zh.title: 特朗普政府与精神航空公司展开救助方案谈判
zh.summary: 特朗普政府正在与陷入困境的廉价航空公司精神航空公司谈判救助方案，表明政府可能干预航空业。此举反映了对维护航空公司产能和竞争的关切。

title: S&P 500 rises, Nasdaq hits new high after U.S. extends Iran ceasefire: Live updates
summary: Stock markets rallied after President Trump extended the ceasefire with Iran, with the Nasdaq hitting record highs and the S&P 500 gaining ground. The ceasefire extension boosted investor sentiment by reducing geopolitical risk.
content: President Donald Trump extended the U.S. ceasefire with Iran on Tuesday afternoon.

zh.title: 美国延长伊朗停火后标普500上升，纳斯达克创新高
zh.summary: 特朗普总统延长与伊朗停火后，股票市场上涨，纳斯达克创下新高，标普500指数上扬。停火延长通过降低地缘政治风险提振了投资者情绪。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Axe Compute, AST SpaceMobile, United Airlines, GE Vernova & more
summary: Multiple stocks experienced significant midday price movements, including Axe Compute, AST SpaceMobile, United Airlines, and GE Vernova among others. The varied movers reflect diverse sector dynamics and company-specific news.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves midday.

title: Intel’s stock has soared ahead of earnings. Are expectations now too high?
summary: Intel's stock has surged on optimism about foundry services and CPU performance, but analysts warn the recent gains may exceed realistic expectations for near-term results. The rally raises questions about whether valuations accurately reflect Intel's operational prospects.
content: Intel shares have benefited from foundry and CPU optimism — but the excitement may be out of step with reality, analysts say.

zh.title: 英特尔股价在财报前飙升。预期现在是否过高？
zh.summary: 英特尔股价因对代工服务和CPU性能的乐观情绪而飙升，但分析师警告最近的涨幅可能超过了对近期业绩的现实预期。此次上涨引发了人们对估值是否准确反映英特尔运营前景的疑问。

title: Buy these two chip stocks primed to benefit from a foldable iPhone, says Barclays
summary: Barclays recommends buying Qorvo and Skyworks Solutions, citing strong growth potential from Apple's anticipated first foldable iPhone launching later this year. The new device category is expected to drive demand for specialized semiconductor components.
content: Qorvo and Skyworks Solutions should see their shares rise due to the first foldable iPhone, which is expected to debut later this year, per Barclays.

zh.title: 巴克莱建议购买这两只芯片股，它们有望从可折叠iPhone受益
zh.summary: 巴克莱建议购买Qorvo和Skyworks Solutions，理由是Apple预期今年晚些时候推出的首款可折叠iPhone具有强劲的增长潜力。这一新的设备类别预计将推动对专门半导体元件的需求。

title: Rep. David Scott, a Georgia Democrat seeking his 13th term in Congress, dies at age 80
summary: U.S. Representative David Scott, a Georgia Democrat and the first Black chairman of the House Agriculture Committee, has died at age 80. His death removes a prominent voice from Congress as he sought reelection to his 13th term.
content: U.S. Rep. David Scott, a Georgia Democrat and the first Black chairman of the House Agriculture Committee, has died at age 80.

zh.title: 寻求第13届任期的乔治亚州民主党人代表大卫·斯科特在80岁时去世
zh.summary: 美国众议院议员、乔治亚州民主党人大卫·斯科特是众议院农业委员会首位黑人主席，在80岁时去世。他的去世削弱了国会的一个重要声音，他当时正在争取第13届任期的连任。

title: Tesla earnings don't really matter to the stock anymore. What Wall Street is watching for
summary: Investors are increasingly focused on Tesla's energy storage operations, autonomous driving progress, and robotaxi development rather than traditional earnings metrics. These forward-looking initiatives have become the primary drivers of stock sentiment.
content: Signals on energy storage, autonomous driving and robotaxis are top of mind for investors

zh.title: 特斯拉盈利不再真正重要。华尔街在关注什么

title: Joe Terranova shares why he’s buying Netflix stock as it pulls back after earnings
summary: Investor Joe Terranova recommends buying Netflix stock as it declines following earnings, viewing the pullback as a buying opportunity; analyst Stephen Weiss also made a bullish case for UnitedHealth Group. The commentary reflects confidence in both companies despite recent weakness.
content: On Wednesday's "Halftime Report" show, investor Stephen Weiss also made the bull case for UnitedHealth Group stock.

title: Microsoft's LinkedIn names longtime exec Dan Shapero its new CEO
summary: Microsoft announced that Daniel Shapero will lead LinkedIn as its new CEO, reporting to Ryan Roslansky, who previously held the role since 2020 and now has expanded responsibilities. The leadership change brings fresh direction to the professional networking platform.
content: Microsoft said Daniel Shapero will be the new CEO of LinkedIn, reporting to Ryan Roslansky, who held the job since 2020 and now has added responsibility.

zh.title: 微软LinkedIn任命长期高管丹·沙佩罗为新CEO

title: We're raising our price target on GE Vernova as AI fuels another monster quarter
summary: Analysts are raising their price target for GE Vernova following strong quarterly results driven by AI-related energy demand, as the company benefits from infrastructure needs supporting AI computing. The company is positioned at the forefront of the energy transition fueled by artificial intelligence.

zh.title: 由于AI推动创纪录季度表现，我们提高了GE Vernova的目标价格
zh.summary: 由于AI相关能源需求推动的强劲季度成绩，分析师们提高了GE Vernova的目标价格，该公司受益于支持AI计算所需的基础设施建设。该公司处于由人工智能推动的能源转型的最前沿。

title: Thief who swiped purse of ex-DHS chief Kristi Noem gets 3 years in prison
summary: Chilean national Mario Bustamante Leiva received a 3-year prison sentence for stealing the purse of former DHS Secretary Kristi Noem; authorities say he entered the U.S. illegally to commit crimes. The case highlights security vulnerabilities and immigration enforcement in Washington, D.C.
content: The man, Chilean national Mario Bustamante Leiva, "came to Washington illegally to prey on citizens of the District," said U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro said.

zh.title: 偷窃前国土安全部长克里斯蒂·诺姆钱包的小偷被判3年监禁

title: Mortgage rates sink again, and homebuyers jump back in
summary: Mortgage rates are declining, spurring renewed demand from homebuyers seeking more affordable financing. The development signals improving conditions for residential real estate transactions.

title: Gen Z college students are looking for scholarships on TikTok. There's a better way, experts say
summary: Gen Z students increasingly turn to TikTok to find college scholarships, but consumer advocates warn this approach carries significant risks. Experts recommend more vetted financial resources for scholarship searches.

summary: Robinhood's venture fund has invested $75 million in OpenAI, allowing retail traders direct exposure to the AI company for the first time. The move democratizes access to high-value AI investments previously limited to institutional investors.

title: When dentists start getting cold calls about private credit, you know the fad has peaked
summary: Private credit investments are being aggressively marketed to non-financial professionals like dentists, signaling the sector may be reaching peak popularity. The broadening pitch suggests yields may be inflated relative to actual risk.
content: Promise of excess yield and the “safety” of a bond lures retail investors — but what looks too good to be true often is.

zh.title: 当牙医开始接到关于私人信贷的冷电话时，你就知道这股风潮已经过去了
zh.summary: 私人信贷投资正在积极向非金融专业人士（如牙医）推销，这表明该行业可能正在达到流行的顶峰。推销范围的扩大表明收益率相对于实际风险可能被夸大了。

summary: Google has launched new custom TPU chips designed to challenge Nvidia's market dominance with improved cost efficiency and storage capabilities. The chips represent Google's ongoing effort to build competitive AI infrastructure.

title: Why Strategy’s stock is outperforming bitcoin these days

summary: While mega-cap tech stocks recovered in April, the market's biggest winners are smaller, highly speculative companies. The shift reveals investors' appetite for significantly riskier bets as the market rebounds.

content: Oil prices edged lower on Wednesday as uncertainty lingered over the trajectory of the U.S.–Iran conflict.

zh.title: Trump延长与伊朗停火后油价小幅下跌
zh.summary: 在Trump延长与伊朗停火协议后，油价小幅下跌，但对冲突走向的不确定性依然存在。市场波动反映出人们对潜在升级的持久担忧。

title: CEO with over $3 trillion under management tells Gen-Z to think past ‘hobby investing’
summary: A major asset manager warns Gen-Z investors to move beyond casual "hobby investing" amid deepening disillusionment with wealth management institutions. The warning reflects broader concerns about generational wealth gaps and institutional trust.
content: The comments come against a backdrop of deepening disillusionment among younger investors and rising mistrust in wealth management institutions.

zh.title: 管理资产超3万亿美元的首席执行官告诫Z世代超越"爱好投资"
zh.summary: 一家主要资产管理公司警告Z世代投资者在对财富管理机构失望加深之际，要超越随意的"爱好投资"。这一警告反映了对代际财富差距和机构信任的更广泛担忧。

title: Japan's Nikkei 225 rises to record high as Trump extends Iran ceasefire
summary: Japan's Nikkei 225 reached record highs as Trump extended the Iran ceasefire, contrasting with broader Asian market weakness. The divergence reflects mixed sentiment about geopolitical developments and regional economic outlook.
content: Asia markets traded broadly lower, amid deepening uncertainty over the Middle East conflict, even as Trump extended a temporary ceasefire.

zh.title: Trump延长伊朗停火期间，日本日经225指数创历史新高
zh.summary: 在Trump延长伊朗停火期间，日本日经225指数创历史新高，与更广泛的亚洲市场疲软形成对比。这种分化反映了对地缘政治发展和地区经济前景的复杂情绪。

title: Price rise contingency plans 'ready if needed'
summary: The Isle of Man treasury has prepared contingency plans to protect essential services as prices surge from the Iran war. Governments are developing economic cushions against higher fuel and energy costs.
content: The Manx treasury says plans are in place to protect essential services in the wake of the Iran war.

zh.title: 价格上升应急计划"必要时已准备好"
zh.summary: 随着伊朗战争导致价格飙升，马恩岛财政部已准备好应急计划以保护基本服务。政府正在制定经济缓冲措施来应对燃料和能源成本的上升。

title: War in Iran 'has put up our fuel bill by £100,000'
summary: The Iran war has significantly increased fuel costs for trucking, care services, and heating oil users, with some sectors reporting increases exceeding £100,000. Essential service providers face mounting operational pressures from geopolitical disruption.
content: How are rising oil prices affecting truckers, carers and heating oil users?

zh.title: 伊朗战争"已使我们的燃油账单增加了10万英镑"
zh.summary: 伊朗战争显著增加了运输、护理服务和取暖油用户的燃料成本，一些部门报告的增幅超过10万英镑。基本服务提供商面临地缘政治中断带来的持续运营压力。

title: Charities deal with impact of higher fuel prices
summary: Charities report 35% fuel price increases due to the Iran conflict have severely impacted logistics and operations. Essential organizations struggle to maintain services as transportation costs rise.
content: Ferrying items has been made more difficult by fuel price increases of 35%, one charity says.

zh.title: 慈善机构应对燃油价格上升的影响
zh.summary: 慈善机构报告称伊朗冲突导致的35%燃油价格上升严重影响了物流和运营。必要服务组织正在努力维持服务，因为运输成本上升。

title: Help for people who use heating oil is on the way
summary: North Lincolnshire Council is promoting a support scheme to help households manage rising heating oil costs from the Iran war. Government assistance programs aim to protect vulnerable populations from energy price shocks.
content: North Lincolnshire Council is encouraging households to sign up for a support scheme.

zh.title: 供暖燃油支持计划启动
zh.summary: 北林肯郡委员会推出支持计划，帮助家庭应对伊朗战争导致的供暖油成本上升。政府援助项目旨在保护弱势群体免受能源价格冲击。

title: Hormuz is just a ‘dry run’ if China and U.S. go to war in the Pacific, Singapore foreign minister warns
summary: Singapore's foreign minister warns that the Strait of Hormuz blockade serves as a preview of potential U.S.-China conflict in the Pacific. The commentary highlights escalating geopolitical tensions beyond the Middle East.
content: Balakrishnan was discussing the complexities of the U.S.- China relationship from Singapore's perspective with CNBC's Steve Sedgwick at the CONVERGE LIVE event.

zh.title: 新加坡外长：若中美在太平洋开战，霍尔木兹海峡只是"演习"
zh.summary: 新加坡外长警告，霍尔木兹海峡封锁是美中在太平洋潜在冲突的预兆。评论强调了中东以外地缘政治紧张局势的升级。

title: World's biggest maker of condoms set to raise prices due to Iran war
summary: Karex, the world's largest condom manufacturer producing over 5 billion units annually, plans price increases due to Iran war-driven fuel costs. The move illustrates how geopolitical shocks ripple across diverse global industries.
content: Malaysia-based Karex produces more than five billion condoms a year and supplies global brands like Durex and Trojan.

zh.title: 全球最大避孕套生产商因伊朗战争将提价
zh.summary: 全球最大的避孕套制造商卡瑞克斯每年生产超过50亿件，将因伊朗战争导致的燃油成本而提价。这反映了地缘政治冲击如何在全球各行业产生连锁反应。

title: Prices for World Cup public transportation range from free to $150. Here’s what’s going on.
summary: World Cup public transportation fares range from free to $150, with some train fares inflated from $26 to $150. The dramatic price disparity raises fairness concerns for event attendees and access equity.
content: In one instance, train fares are being inflated from $26 to $150.

zh.title: 世界杯公共交通价格从免费到150美元不等。这是怎么回事。
zh.summary: 世界杯公共交通票价从免费到150美元不等，部分列车票价从26美元上涨至150美元。这种巨大的价格差异引发了人们对赛事参与者公平性和出行公平性的担忧。

title: Oil prices dip as Trump extends Iran war ceasefire
summary: Oil prices declined as Trump extended the Iran ceasefire, though the U.S. will maintain its blockade of Iranian ports pending peace progress. The continued blockade sustains pressure on global energy supplies.
content: The president also said the US will continue to blockade Iran's ports until peace talks progress.

zh.title: 特朗普延长伊朗战争停火之际油价下跌
zh.summary: 随着特朗普延长伊朗停火协议，油价有所下跌，但美国将维持对伊朗港口的封锁以等待和平进展。持续的封锁对全球能源供应造成压力。

title: Polymarket launches trading of heavily leveraged 'perps' contracts
summary: Prediction markets platform Polymarket is expanding into trading perpetual futures contracts, signaling growth in the derivatives market.
content: Prediction markets platform Polymarket is expanding into trading of perpetual futures contacts, the company said Tuesday.

zh.title: Polymarket推出高杠杆永续期货合约交易
zh.summary: 预测市场平台Polymarket正在扩展到交易永续期货合约，标志着衍生品市场的增长。

title: Judge dismisses Kash Patel's defamation lawsuit over claim he frequented 'nightclubs'
summary: A judge dismissed FBI Director Kash Patel's $250 million defamation lawsuit against The Atlantic over claims regarding his personal conduct, marking a legal setback for Patel.
content: The lawsuit was dismissed a day after FBI Director Kash Patel filed a $250 million defamation complaint against The Atlantic over claims he abused alcohol.

zh.title: 法官驳回卡什·帕特尔因"经常出入夜总会"指控提起的诽谤诉讼
zh.summary: 法官驳回了FBI局长卡什·帕特尔针对《大西洋月刊》提起的2.5亿美元诽谤诉讼，该诉讼涉及对其个人行为的指控，对帕特尔来说是一次法律挫折。

title: SpaceX says it can buy Cursor later this year for $60 billion or pay $10 billion for 'our work together'
summary: SpaceX has secured rights to acquire coding startup Cursor for $60 billion later this year, or alternatively pay $10 billion for collaborative work.
content: SpaceX said it's obtained the rights to buy coding startup Cursor for $60 billion later this year or pay $10 billion for the work they're doing together.

zh.title: SpaceX表示可在今年晚些时候以60亿美元收购Cursor，或支付10亿美元进行合作
zh.summary: SpaceX已获得今年晚些时候以60亿美元收购编程初创公司Cursor的权利，或者也可支付10亿美元进行合作工作。

title: What is Cursor? SpaceX could buy the AI company for a whopping $60 billion.
summary: SpaceX is seeking to acquire AI coding startup Cursor as it enters the competitive AI tools market alongside rivals Anthropic and OpenAI.
content: Anthropic and OpenAI have emphasized AI coding tools, and now SpaceX is looking to bulk up its efforts in this buzzy area.

zh.title: Cursor是什么？SpaceX可能以惊人的600亿美元收购这家AI公司
zh.summary: SpaceX正在寻求收购AI编码初创公司Cursor，以进入竞争激烈的AI工具市场，与Anthropic和OpenAI等竞争对手对抗
